channel.title: Mark's Prayer Site
channel.description: Recent content on Mark's Prayer Site

item.title: Today's Prayer
item.description: February 8, 2026 Today's Verse 1 Peter 4:16 [16] Yet if anyone suffers as a Christian, let him not be ashamed, but let him glorify God in that name. Today's Memory Verse 2 Corinthians 5:17 - Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation. The old has passed away; behold, the new has come. Today's Westminster Catechism Q/A 39 - What is the duty which God requireth of man?
